        have h₆₁ : (0 : ℝ) ≤ I.ZDB.c₂ σ := by

        have h₆₂ : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (log V : ℝ) ^ 2 := by positivity

        positivity
      have h₇ : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (I.ZDB.c₁ σ / (1 - I.ZDB.p σ) ^ (I.ZDB.q σ + 1)) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ + 1) ((1 - I.ZDB.p σ) * (log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ + 1) ((1 - I.ZDB.p σ) * (log V))) := by
        -- The third term is non-negative because of the properties of the incomplete Gamma function and the parameters
        sorry
      have h₈ : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log V))) := by
        -- The fourth term is non-negative because of the properties of the incomplete Gamma function and the parameters
        sorry
      linarith
    -- Combining the inequalities gives the desired result
    linarith
  exact h₁

have h₁ : s₀ σ U V = riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico σ 1) (Set.Ico U V) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) := rfl
  have h₂ : I.B₀ σ U V = (I.ZDB.c₁ σ) * (log V)^(I.ZDB.q σ) / V ^ (1 - (I.ZDB.p σ)) + (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (log V)^2 / V + (I.ZDB.c₁ σ / (1 - I.ZDB.p σ)^(I.ZDB.q σ+1)) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ+1) ((1-I.ZDB.p σ)*(log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ+1) ((1-I.ZDB.p σ)*(log V))) + (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log V))) := rfl
  have h₃ : s₀ σ U V ≤ I.B₀ σ U V := by
    simp only [h₁, h₂]
    have h₄ : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico σ 1) (Set.Ico U V) (fun ρ ↦ 1 / ρ.im) ≤ (I.ZDB.c₁ σ) * (log V)^(I.ZDB.q σ) / V ^ (1 - (I.ZDB.p σ)) + (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (log V)^2 / V + (I.ZDB.c₁ σ / (1 - I.ZDB.p σ)^(I.ZDB.q σ+1)) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ+1) ((1-I.ZDB.p σ)*(log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ+1) ((1-I.ZDB.p σ)*(log V))) + (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log V))) := by
      have h₅ := I.ZDB bound σ hσ' U V hU hV
      norm_num at h₅ ⊢
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Real.log_pos, Real.log_lt_log_iff]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try assumption) <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Set.Ico, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
          <;>
          norm_num <;>
          linarith
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          ring_nf at *
          <;>
          simp_all [Set.Ico, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
          <;>
          norm_num <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          norm_num at *
          <;>
          simp_all [Set.Ico, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
          <;>
          norm_num <;>
          linarith
        })
    linarith
  exact h₃

exact by

have h₁ : s₀ σ U V ≤ 0 := by
    have h₂ : s₀ σ U V = 0 := by
      -- Prove that s₀ σ U V = 0 by showing the sum is empty or zero
      simp [s₀, Set.Ico_eq_empty_iff]
      <;>
      (try {
        cases' le_or_lt σ 1 with h h <;>
        cases' le_or_lt U V with h' h' <;>
        simp_all [Set.Icc_eq_empty, Set.Ico_eq_empty_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num at * <;>
        linarith
      }) <;>
      (try {
        -- Use the fact that the sum is over an empty set
        have h₃ : {x : ℂ // x ∈ Set.Ico σ 1 ∧ x.im ∈ Set.Ico U V} = ∅ := by
          apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
          intro x hx
          have h₄ := hx
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_Ico] at h₄
          norm_num at h₄ <;>
          (try {
            cases' h₄ with h₄₁ h₄₂
            <;>
            (try {
              cases' h₄₁ with h₄₁₁ h₄₁₂
              <;>
              (try {
                simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_lt]
                <;>
                nlinarith
              })
            })
          })
        simp_all
      }) <;>
      (try {
        -- Use the fact that the sum is over an empty set
        have h₃ : {x : ℂ // x ∈ Set.Ico σ 1 ∧ x.im ∈ Set.Ico U V} = ∅ := by
          apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
          intro x hx
          have h₄ := hx
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_Ico] at h₄
          norm_num at h₄ <;>
          (try {
            cases' h₄ with h₄₁ h₄₂
            <;>
            (try {
              cases' h₄₁ with h₄₁₁ h₄₁₂
              <;>
              (try {
                simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_lt]
                <;>
                nlinarith
              })
            })
          })
        simp_all
      })
    rw [h₂]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₂ : I.B₀ σ U V ≥ 0 := by
    -- Prove that I.B₀ σ U V ≥ 0 by showing each term is non-negative
    have h₃ : (I.ZDB.c₁ σ) * (Real.log V) ^ (I.ZDB.q σ) / (V : ℝ) ^ (1 - (I.ZDB.p σ)) ≥ 0 := by sorry
    have h₄ : (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (Real.log V) ^ 2 / V ≥ 0 := by sorry
    have h₅ : (I.ZDB.c₁ σ / (1 - I.ZDB.p σ) ^ (I.ZDB.q σ + 1)) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ + 1) ((1 - I.ZDB.p σ) * (Real.log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q σ + 1) ((1 - I.ZDB.p σ) * (Real.log V))) ≥ 0 := by sorry
    have h₆ : (I.ZDB.c₂ σ) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 (Real.log U) - Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 (Real.log V)) ≥ 0 := by sorry
    -- Summing up all non-negative terms
    linarith
  linarith
